narrative:
Jan Paul van Hecke is a Centre-Back representing the Kingdom of the Netherlands. His overall rating of 7.71/10 places him in the top 1% of centre-backs at this tournament. This reflects his consistent performance, with a rating range of 7.28–8.13 across matches.

At this World Cup, van Hecke demonstrates strong defensive work with 5.667 clearances per 90 minutes and 1.667 tackles per 90 minutes. Notably, he has scored 0.333 goals per 90 minutes, significantly exceeding his 0.081 expected goals per 90 minutes at the tournament. This offensive output contrasts with his 0.058 goals per 90 minutes at club level over the last two seasons.
